text: - **Postmortem** `docs/wiki/episodes/2026-06-29-2-daemon-cleanup-lock-file-deletion-caused.md`: lock-file deletion on shutdown caused two daemons to race and fight over `state.db` — fixed, now `lifecycle.rs:238-244`: *"Do NOT remove the lock file here — deleting it while the flock is still held lets a racing spawner open a new file (different inode) and acquire an independent lock, causing two daemons to overlap."*
